channel.title: Allotment on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Allotment on Nature Works

item.title: Allotment sizes
item.description:
A full allotment is 250m²

Just a quick note to myself, according to The National Allotment Society, a UK allotment is 10 poles, which is 250m². http://localhost:1313/blog/230927-allotment-sizes/

item.title: My Wildlife Allotment
item.description:
Nadine Mitschunas has created the most amazing wildlife allotments, and writes a blog for the Hardy Plant Society

I first saw My Wildlife Allotment on BBC Gardeners World a couple of years ago, and was impressed then with the visual richness of the allotment. http://localhost:1313/blog/230227-wildlife-allotment/
